H2: Product Label FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Product Labels

Professional Quality Product Labels for Business, Retail & Manufacturing

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design Your Product Labels Online or Upload Your Artwork Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Product Labels for Professional Branding

Create professional product labels that enhance your brand identity and meet industry standards. Our custom product labels are printed on high-quality vinyl material with your choice of glossy or matte finish. Whether you need labels for bottles, packages, or retail products, our advanced printing technology delivers vibrant colors and sharp details that make your products stand out. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Choose from multiple cut options including die-cut and kiss-cut styles to match your application needs. Our product labels feature durable adhesive that bonds securely to glass, plastic, metal, and paper surfaces. With production times ranging from 1-5 business days, you can get your custom product labels quickly without compromising on quality.

Upload your existing artwork or use our online design tool to create labels from scratch. Our system accepts various file formats and provides detailed artwork guidelines to ensure your product labels print exactly as intended. Every order includes a digital proof for your approval before production begins.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Product Labels

Ordering product labels is straightforward with our streamlined online process. Start by selecting your label size and quantity, then choose your preferred cut option and production timeline. You can either design your product labels using our online tool or upload your print-ready artwork files.

Design Process

Our online designer lets you create product labels from scratch by uploading images, adding text, and selecting colors. Choose from our clipart library or upload your own graphics and logos. If you prefer to upload a complete design file, we recommend EPS format for the highest quality results. Our system guides you through the design process with helpful tips and preview options.

Payment

All product labels must be paid in full before production begins. We accept major credit cards including VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your order enters production. Once payment is processed, you'll receive order confirmation and tracking information.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your product label order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your order progress through every stage of production, from file processing to shipping. Click the tracking link in your email to get real-time updates on your order status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Product Label Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule offers multiple turnaround options to meet your timeline requirements. Production time begins once your artwork is approved and payment is received. If your order requires a proof or is flagged in prepress, the production clock starts from approval confirmation.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Fast-track production for urgent product label orders. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes may be available in special circumstances - contact customer service for availability and pricing.

2 Business Days Express Production

Quick turnaround production ideal for time-sensitive projects. This express option provides reliable delivery for product labels when you need them fast but have slightly more flexibility than priority production.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option offers the best balance of speed and value. This free production upgrade works well for most custom product label orders where you need quality results within a reasonable timeframe.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Budget-friendly production option when you have more time flexibility. Choose the 5-day option to save money on your product label order while still receiving the same high-quality printing and materials.

Remember that total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time. Production begins when file upload is complete and approved, not from the initial order placement.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die Cut vs Kiss Cut Product Label Options

Understanding the difference between die cut and kiss cut product labels helps you choose the right option for your application. Both cutting methods use the same high-quality vinyl material and printing process, but they differ in how the labels are finished and how you apply them.

Die Cut Product Labels

Die cut means we cut completely through both the vinyl label material and the paper backing. This creates individually cut product labels with no excess material around the design - similar to using a cookie cutter. Each label matches the exact contour of your design, providing a clean, professional appearance when applied.

Die cut product labels work best when you want the label to follow your design shape exactly. Back slit (crack and peel) backing is available on Standard and Permanent adhesive options for easier application of individual labels.

Kiss Cut Product Labels

Kiss cut means we only cut through the vinyl layer while leaving the paper backing intact. This creates a border of backing material around each product label, making them easier to peel and apply. The backing material provides a convenient grip area for handling individual labels.

Kiss cut product labels are ideal when you need easy removal from the backing sheet or when applying multiple labels quickly. The backing border also helps prevent damage to label edges during handling and storage.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Product Label Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your product labels print with exceptional quality and accurate colors. Our printing process works best with vector-based artwork, but we also accept high-resolution raster images when prepared correctly.

Preferred File Types

For optimal product label printing results, submit artwork in Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated PostScript) or PDF format. These vector formats maintain crisp edges and solid colors at any size. When submitting EPS or PDF files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues.

Additional File Formats

We also accept JPG, TIFF, and PNG files for product label artwork. These raster formats must be high resolution to avoid pixelation in the final printed labels. Submit raster files at 100% scale (full output size) at 100 DPI minimum, or proportionally higher resolution for smaller scale files.

File Setup Tips

Set up your artwork proportionate to the exact size product label you're ordering. Convert all text to outlines to ensure fonts print correctly. Only include bleed if necessary for your design. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files - keep layers separate for easier editing if needed.

Clearly indicate cut lines for all product label designs. Vector artwork scales perfectly and maintains quality at any size, making it ideal for text and geometric shapes. Raster images depend on resolution, so enlarging beyond the original file size will reduce quality.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Product Label Shipping Information

We offer multiple shipping options to deliver your custom product labels when you need them. Shipping time is separate from production time, so factor both timeframes when planning your order delivery. All orders include tracking information for monitoring your shipment progress.

Shipping Methods

Choose from economy ground shipping for cost-effective delivery, or upgrade to expedited options including 2-day and overnight shipping. Ground shipping typically takes 3-7 business days depending on your location. Expedited shipping provides guaranteed delivery timeframes for time-sensitive product label orders.

Shipping Time Expectations

Total delivery time combines production time plus shipping time. For example, if you choose 3-day production with 2-day shipping, expect delivery approximately 5 business days from order approval. Rush shipping options are available for urgent product label needs.

Important Shipping Notes

Orders ship Monday through Friday, excluding holidays. Saturday delivery is available with premium shipping options. International shipping is available to most countries with extended delivery timeframes. Contact customer service for international shipping rates and delivery estimates for your product labels.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Product Label Installation & Application

Proper installation ensures your product labels adhere securely and maintain their appearance over time. Following these application steps helps achieve professional results whether you're labeling bottles, packages, or retail products.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly with isopropyl alcohol or degreasing cleaner. Remove all dirt, oil, moisture, and residue that could interfere with adhesion. Allow the surface to dry completely before applying your product labels. Room temperature surfaces work best for initial adhesion.

Applying Product Labels

For die cut product labels, remove the label from the backing and position carefully - the strong adhesive bonds quickly upon contact. For kiss cut labels, use the backing border to grip and position the label before pressing down. Start from one edge and smooth across to avoid air bubbles.

Removing Transfer Tape

If your product labels include transfer tape, remove it slowly at a sharp angle after application. Pull the tape back on itself rather than straight up. This technique helps ensure the label stays adhered to your product surface rather than lifting with the transfer tape.

For best results, avoid applying product labels in direct sunlight or extreme temperatures. Allow 24 hours for full adhesive cure, especially in cold conditions. Once properly applied, your product labels will maintain their bond and appearance for years.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Product Labels?

Product labels are adhesive vinyl decals designed specifically for identifying, branding, and providing information about commercial products. These labels are typically made from durable vinyl material with strong adhesive backing that bonds permanently to bottles, packages, containers, and retail items. Product labels serve essential functions including brand identification, ingredient lists, usage instructions, and regulatory compliance information. They are commonly applied during manufacturing or packaging processes and must withstand handling, storage, and consumer use while maintaining legibility and appearance.

Design Your Custom Product Labels Today

Create professional product labels that enhance your brand and meet industry requirements. Our advanced printing technology and premium vinyl materials ensure your labels look great and last long. Choose from multiple sizes, cut options, and production timeframes to match your specific needs.

Start designing your product labels online using our easy-to-use design tool, or upload your existing artwork files. With fast turnaround options and reliable shipping, you can have custom product labels ready when your business needs them. Our customer service team is available to help with design questions and technical support throughout the ordering process.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Product Label FAQs

What material are product labels made from?

Product labels are printed on high-quality vinyl material that provides excellent durability and color retention. The vinyl construction resists moisture, UV exposure, and normal handling while maintaining adhesive strength over time.

Do product labels have glossy or matte finish options?

Yes, you can choose between glossy and matte finish options for your product labels. Glossy finish provides vibrant colors and high shine, while matte finish offers a subtle, professional appearance that reduces glare and fingerprints.

What is the minimum order quantity for product labels?

We accommodate both small and large quantity orders for product labels. Contact our sales team for specific minimum quantities as they may vary depending on label size and complexity of your design.

How long do product labels last when applied outdoors?

When applied to clean, smooth surfaces, product labels typically last 3-5 years outdoors with minimal fading or adhesive failure. Indoor applications can last significantly longer depending on environmental conditions and surface preparation.

Can I get a proof before my product labels are printed?

Yes, we provide digital proofs for all custom product label orders. You must approve the proof before production begins, ensuring your labels meet your exact specifications for colors, text, and layout.

What surfaces work best for product label application?

Product labels adhere best to clean, smooth surfaces including glass, plastic, metal, and coated paper. Textured or porous surfaces may require special adhesive options for optimal bonding performance.

What file formats do you accept for product label artwork?

We prefer EPS and PDF vector files for the highest quality product label printing. We also accept high-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files when prepared at proper resolution and scale for your label size.
